utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: 1) health_coverage: present, but the format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. The plan lists physical and mental with named plans and monthly costs—this is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: present with plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: present with plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. 4) additional_services: present with an add-on name and monthly cost—fully specified. 5) total_budget: present with monthly and annual totals—fully specified. All 5 items are included and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and Adventure Travel Coverage as an add-on. I matched each item exactly to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their numeric ratings.
